topics.title: Aero Discovery overview
topics.summary: Aero Discovery turns property-operating responses into an explainable readiness profile, risk view and pilot roadmap.
details: Adaptive questions change with prior answers.
Users can review and revise decisions.
Outputs include executive and structured-data downloads.

topics.title: Assessment method
topics.summary: The assessment captures business context, pain points, controls, systems, data readiness, delivery preferences and budget.
details: Conditional questions reduce irrelevant capture.
Inline feedback explains implications.
Review mode supports reversible decisions.

topics.title: Pilot scope
topics.summary: A strong pilot is bounded, measurable and focused on a small number of workflows and user groups.
details: Define acceptance criteria and KPIs.
Limit interfaces to those needed to prove value.
Confirm owners, controls and escalation paths.

topics.title: Target architecture
topics.summary: The recommended architecture reuses existing systems, establishes governed APIs and identifiers, and adds automation in phases.
details: Use server-side identity and secrets.
Log privileged and integration activity.
Separate demo browser storage from production persistence.

topics.title: Governance and risk
topics.summary: Each material risk should map to an owner, control, evidence requirement, escalation path and review cadence.
details: Prioritise access control and auditability.
Include service continuity and reconciliation.
Validate third-party and integration responsibilities.

topics.title: POPIA and privacy
topics.summary: Production delivery should apply purpose limitation, minimum necessary data, consent evidence, retention rules and data-subject workflows.
details: Do not expose secrets in the browser.
Record consent and communication preferences.
Define breach and access-request procedures.

topics.title: WhatsApp integration
topics.summary: A production WhatsApp channel should use Meta Cloud API or an approved provider with verified server-side webhooks.
details: Govern templates and opt-ins.
Support human escalation.
Store credentials and signatures server-side.

topics.title: Commercial model
topics.summary: A defensible sequence is fixed-fee discovery, a bounded pilot, then a managed-service or SaaS operating model.
details: Align scope to budget.
Separate implementation from recurring support.
Use acceptance criteria for milestone payments.

topics.title: Accessibility and responsive UX
topics.summary: The portal supports mobile and desktop layouts, keyboard interaction, reduced motion and theme adaptation.
details: Use semantic labels and focus management.
Do not rely on colour alone.
Keep touch targets usable on mobile.

topics.title: Aero CGI interaction module
topics.summary: The Aero CGI module uses a 20-pose character sprite, state animations and pointer-aware 3D parallax across landing, wizard and chat instances.
details: States include idle, wave, thinking, explaining, alert, working, success and sleeping.
Touch and reduced-motion users receive a stable presentation.
Agent events synchronise visual state with chat and assessment activity.

topics.title: Repository implementation
topics.summary: The application is a static GitHub Pages demonstration with modular CSS, JavaScript, knowledge and CI validation.
details: Assets are packaged into the Pages artifact.
JavaScript and JSON are syntax checked.
Production AI requires a secure webhook backend.

topics.title: Recommended next steps
topics.summary: Validate the assessment with stakeholders, confirm KPIs and owners, approve the pilot backlog, then mobilise delivery governance.
details: Confirm data and system owners.
Map risks to controls.
Approve architecture, budget and support model.
